description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set within a rectangular, landscaped lot surrounded by a perimeter wall. The building features a large, dark, low-pitched hip roof and is flanked by manicured gardens, trees, and shrubs on all sides. The front approach is marked by a wide pathway leading to a covered porch, while the rear includes a spacious patio area and a rectangular swimming pool. The property is bordered by tall hedges and trees, providing privacy and a sense of enclosure. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with large panes facing the front and rear gardens. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open outdoor spaces, and a harmonious integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a dark hip roof, landscaped gardens, a front porch, and a backyard pool, all enclosed by a perimeter wall and tall hedges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide pathway, covered porch, and symmetrical landscaping leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, the backyard pool, and the extensive garden areas along the perimeter.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring the swimming pool, patio area, and the back facade of the bungalow with large windows and greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the side garden, pool, and the continuation of the perimeter wall and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with large rear windows
